shortDescription: 6-year MD in English · Batumi · hospital-network integrated medical education

policyAlert.summary: Verify current tuition, intake dates, and admission requirements on abmu.edu.ge/ before quoting clients. Indian students: confirm NEET eligibility and NMC guidance separately.

alert.title: Foreign medical degree pathway
alert.body: Verify NMC recognition and FMGE/NExT requirements before quoting Avicenna Batumi Medical University to Indian clients.

about.label: Description
about.value: Avicenna Batumi Medical University (ABMU) offers Medical Doctor (MD). Integrated clinical exposure from first year through affiliated hospital network in Batumi region.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Meet ABMU admission requirements · English proficiency where required · Indian applicants: verify NEET eligibility with current NMC rules

about.label: Accreditation highlight
about.value: Founded 2022 on hospital-network platform — verify current national accreditation

about.label: Key authority
about.value: Avicenna Batumi Medical University (admissions) · Georgia immigration authorities for study permit / visa

about.label: After graduation
about.value: FMGE/NExT for India · Host-country licensing exams · Verify WDOMS and NMC list status

accreditation: Founded 2022 on hospital-network platform — verify current national accreditation
Simulation centre aligned with American standards per university publications
Verify NMC foreign medical institutions list before Indian client enrollment
mbbs.clinicalTrainingNotes: Integrated clinical exposure from first year through affiliated hospital network in Batumi region.
mbbs.campusNotes: Campus at Tbeti Street, Batumi. Coastal city environment; verify housing and transport with admissions.

relatedPrograms.name: School of Medicine — MD Programme
relatedPrograms.summary: Hospital-integrated curriculum from prevention through rehabilitation. USMLE prep programme offered.

relatedPrograms.name: USMLE Preparation Program
relatedPrograms.summary: Optional USMLE-focused preparation — verify scope and eligibility on official site.

familyOptions.spouseCanAccompany: Possible subject to Georgia dependant visa rules — verify current immigration policy before client commitment.
familyOptions.spouseWorkRights: Spouse work authorization varies by Georgia rules — do not promise employment without visa approval.
familyOptions.childrenCanAccompany: Case-by-case — verify dependant visa rules and schooling availability.
familyOptions.childrenNotes: Plan schooling and childcare before family relocation.
familyOptions.additionalFundsRequired: Additional living funds and health insurance for each dependant — verify with admissions.
familyOptions.visaRoute: Student visa/residence for principal applicant; dependants require separate permits per Georgia rules.
restrictions: Do not promise spouse work without visa approval
Verify all family immigration with official sources
Clinical years may require separate visa strategy (if applicable)

practicePathways.summary: Graduates of Avicenna Batumi Medical University must verify licensing pathways in India (FMGE/NExT), host country, and any international targets on official sources.

india.fmgeNext: Indian citizens with foreign medical degrees must qualify FMGE (transitioning to NExT) and meet NMC requirements before registration in India.
details: Verify institution status on NMC foreign medical institutions list before enrollment.
Degree pathway: Medical Doctor (MD) — set client expectations early vs Indian 5.5-year MBBS.
Internship/clinical hours must meet NMC criteria — verify with current NMC notifications.
Never guarantee FMGE/NExT pass or India registration.

hostCountry.summary: Graduates may pursue medical licensing in Georgia after meeting national requirements — verify with Ministry of Health and university registrar.
details: 6-year English-taught MD programme with clinical training at Georgian partner hospitals.
Student residence permit required — renew per migration rules.
Some graduates pursue USMLE or other international licensing — case-specific; no guarantees.

usCanada.summary: Some Georgian medical universities offer USMLE preparation — verify whether graduates commonly pursue US residency vs Georgia/EU/India pathways.
details: Do not assume automatic US residency eligibility.
Verify whether university publishes USMLE pass rates or match statistics.
Indian return pathway via FMGE/NExT remains primary counsel for most Indian clients.

recognition.who: Verify World Directory of Medical Schools (WDOMS) listing and WFME recognition chain.
recognition.nmc: Counselors must verify current NMC eligible colleges list — status can change; check before each intake.

restrictions: Never guarantee licensure, residency match, or India registration
Verify NMC list at time of admission

documentChecklistSections.label: Admission documents
items: Official transcripts (10th, 12th, bachelor's / pre-med as required)
NEET scorecard (Indian applicants — if required under current NMC rules)
Passport copy — valid 6+ months beyond program

documentChecklistSections.label: Visa & immigration (Georgia — student residence)
items: Proof of tuition payment or financial guarantee
Georgia long-stay D5 / student visa application

applicant.summary: During study in Georgia, students must maintain valid student immigration status. Paid employment rules vary — verify local regulations before advising clients to work.
details: Unauthorized work may violate visa/residence conditions.
University may offer limited on-campus roles — verify with student services.
Maintain migration registration and valid residence permit in Georgia.
restrictions: Never advise clients to work illegally to fund tuition

spouse.summary: Spouse/partner work rights depend on Georgia dependant visa conditions — verify before promising employment.
details: Plan finances assuming limited spouse income unless visa explicitly permits work.
restrictions: Do not promise spouse employment without visa approval

fullCostBreakdown.title: Full cost breakdown — Avicenna Batumi Medical University
fullCostBreakdown.disclaimer: Indicative structure for counselor discussions. Tuition changes each academic year — always quote from https://abmu.edu.ge/en/faculty/educational-programmes before client commitment.

totals.label: Indicative total program budget
totals.value: Calculate from official tuition + full program living costs
totals.notes: Use abmu.edu.ge tuition page; add 15% buffer for currency and fee increases.

eligibility.criterion: NEET qualified (Indian applicants — verify current NMC rule)
eligibility.note: Check NMC notification at admission year

redFlagsBanner: If client expects guaranteed licensure or residency without exams, reset expectations before taking fees.
